one_liner: AAPL at $316 is pressing the upper Bollinger Band ($318.69) with RSI 68.6 — extended after a strong run but DCF shows 39% overvaluation; earnings July 30 are the next catalyst in both directions.

price_action.vol_rank: Below average — below-average volume at all-time high territory
price_action.intraday_story: AAPL pressed to $316.53 (just below the $318.69 upper BB) on below-average volume and closed at $316.22. The Wyckoff resistance at $315.53 was also breached. Technically extended — RSI 68.6 is approaching overbought.

news_catalyst.headline: No AAPL-Specific News — Continued AI Feature Integration Narrative
news_catalyst.summary: No major Apple news today. Stock approaching all-time high territory above Wyckoff resistance ($315.53). Earnings July 30 will cover iPhone demand trends, Apple Intelligence monetization, and Services growth.

technical.macd_signal: Strongly bullish — MACD histogram +2.901, highest on watchlist
technical.summary: AAPL has the strongest MACD histogram on the watchlist (+2.901) and is above both EMAs. But RSI at 68.6 and price pressing against the upper BB at $318.69 with the DCF showing 39% overvaluation makes this an avoid for new entries. Existing holders can ride the momentum into earnings July 30.
technical.wyckoff_narrative: Breaking above Wyckoff resistance at $315.53 is technically positive but on below-average volume — classic upthrust risk territory. Avoid new entries at upper BB.

valuation.summary: DCF $194 vs $316 market price — 39% overvalued. The market prices AAPL at a significant premium to intrinsic value reflecting the Services ecosystem and AI optionality.

key_strengths: Services revenue growing double digits with high margins
1B+ active devices creating recurring monetization platform
key_concerns: iPhone upgrade cycle slowing; China competition from Huawei
fundamentals.summary: B grade (0.71). Solid fundamentals but premium valuation and RSI 68.6 near upper BB argue for avoid until a pullback.

risks: RSI 68.6 and upper BB at $318.69 — overbought; reject here and target EMA50 at $295 on any negative catalyst
Earnings July 30 — China iPhone demand and AI monetization commentary are the key variables
